coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 16:12 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 16:12. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 16:12 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% for 16:12. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/3. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 120% for 0:36. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 36s at 120%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 36s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/3. 120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 55% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 55% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 55% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 36s at 120%. Empty the tank. You've got 8 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 36s at 120%. Then 8min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 36s at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 8 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 0:36 at 120%. Then 8 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 120% × 36s. Then 8min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 73% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
